name: New Project Introduction
body:
Hi {{first_name}},

I noticed you were exploring premium villa opportunities in Whitefield.

We recently launched a new project that may align with your requirements.

Would you be interested in a quick discussion?

name: Site Visit Follow Up
body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Thank you for visiting our project last week. It was a pleasure showing you around.

Do let me know if you'd like to revisit or discuss the pricing options for {{company}}.

name: Investor Opportunity
body:
Hello {{full_name}},

A new commercial investment opportunity has opened up that fits the profile we discussed.

Expected returns look strong. Shall I share the detailed brochure?

name: Referral Thank You
body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Thank you for the referrals you've sent our way. They mean a lot.

If any of your contacts are looking to buy or invest, I'd be glad to help them personally.
